items.description:
AI Writing Agent Fully Upgraded:
·Supports report generation based on local materials and outlines for more relevant content.
·Supports on-device/private models with enhanced data security.
·Supports traceability of reference sources for more credible content.
·Enables real-time online editing and modifications, allowing export only when satisfied for streamlined adjustments.
FollowAlong Visual Optimization: Minor adjustments to the styles of icons and toolbars.
Built-in selected MCP Servers, covering practical needs across multiple scenarios including system control, file management, application management, network protocols, and document office.
MCP Server is upgraded to auto-mode. Once the MCP Server is activated, it automatically matches appropriate tools, eliminating the need for manual selection.
The MCP Server supports intelligent parsing of dragged files and file paths.
The MCP Server supports intelligent parsing of dragged files and file paths.
Adjustment of personal knowledge base access point: The knowledge base access point has been integrated into the UOS AI agent to facilitate usage.
Increased methods for adding files to the knowledge base: A new "Add to AI Knowledge Base" entry has been added in the onboard and right-click menus of files.
New support formats for file upload and knowledge base: Markdown and common code formats have been added.
The shortcut for FollowAlong has been changed to [Super+R].
FollowAlong toolbar now includes [Ask AI], allowing quick queries about selected content.
